titleStmt.title: SII 40.285: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 285. (A.R. No. B. 330 of 1933.) Peddamakkena, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up opposite to the temple of Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmi.
Gives the genealogy of Gaṇḍa-Maṇḍalika, in Telugu poetry, born in the fourth caste and extols him and his wife Būramāṁba.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti Amalapayōdi
jaṁdruṁḍu dayaṁbagunaṭla po
levārijātamunadiriṁccivuṭṭina
vidaṁbunagāṁccana dhārāṇīdharēṁ
dramuna surāvanījamuditaṁbaiyō
ppagatiṁjaturtthavaṁśamuna janiccenu
gra ripusainyajayuṁḍu dhanaṁjayuḍi
lanu . Ātani vaṁśaṁbuna vikhyātulu
narapatulanēkulariginaṁbuvvaṁbota
kṣyādhīśuṁḍu dadbhūtalanāyaku gaṁ
ḍabhūpativuḍḍēnu . Āmanu
jādhinātha sutuṁḍai yudiyeṁcce
virōdhigōtrasutrāyuṁḍu śa
tru padmahimadāyuṁḍu śotravakaṁsa
gominirāmuṁḍarātipaṅktimukha
rāmuṁḍu bhīkaravidviṣkatpurībhīmuṁ
ḍu vairi siṁhabalabhīmuṁḍu mumma
ḍi bhīmuḍimmahini . Atanikinatajaga
tinādariṭamaṇi prabhāvitānavibhūṣī
kṛ tapadapadmuṁḍu gaṁḍa kṣitipati yudi
yiṁce vānikiṁdanayuṁḍai . śāradanī
radapāradanāradakuṁdeṁḍu caṁdanakṣī
ra sudhāhāra tuṣārayaśaṁ paripūri
tadiguṁḍu gaṁḍabhūpati puṭṭenu . caṁ
ḍatarātmīya bhujādaṁḍasmita maṁḍalā
gradalitāhita vēdaṁḍaśiraścyuta
mauktikamaṁḍitaraṇāvanikāḍu gaṁḍa
maṁḍalakuṁḍilanu . harunaku gaurivōleṁjatu
rāsyunakaṁbujapiṭhivole bhūdarunaku
laccivole jamadagniki rēṇuka vōleṁ bā
ṁḍu bhūvarunaku gōṁti voledaśavaktruni bedaki
tavōlenēparaganu bhūramāṁbaguṇabandhuṁḍu
gaṁḍanikagragaṇyamai svadattāṁ paradattā
ṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁddharā ṣaṣṭivvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 40.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
